nasb.text: Solomon also made all the things that were in the house of God: even the golden altar, the tables with the bread of the Presence on them,

esv.text: So Solomon made all the vessels that were in the house of God: the golden altar, the tables for the bread of the Presence,

cnv.text: 所羅門又做了神殿裡的一切器具，就是金壇和放陳設餅的桌子，

ccb.text: 所罗门又造了上帝殿里的金坛和放置供饼的桌子，
